last_result: Cycle 77 complete. RCBC DC#2 confirmed — STEM education benchmarks / NCLB teaching-to-the-test. Four independent evidence programs: NAEP vs. state assessment divergence (Texas Miracle debunked, Haney 2000), Koretz score inflation studies (parallel-test design, direct CA vs. benchmark divergence measurement), Campbell's Law gaming strategies (Jacob & Levitt 2003, Cullen & Reback 2006, reclassification/cheating evidence), and PISA/TIMSS international comparison stability vs. rising state assessment scores. Ontological type: emergent social system — distinct from DC#1 (designed empirical). Two domain confirmations now. RCBC confidence 0.77 → 0.79. D4 path: DC#3 needed (healthcare quality metrics candidate), 2 more ZR cycles needed, confidence gap ~0.03 remaining to 0.82.
next_step: C78: RCBC DC#3 — healthcare quality scorecard gaming (hospital performance reporting under CMS star ratings, Leapfrog Group, Joint Commission accreditation metrics). Third ontological type: regulated institutional domain. Target: 3+ independent evidence programs (readmission reporting gaming, surgical volume threshold manipulation, antibiotic stewardship metric gaming). Also: ZR cycle 2 passive — verify no retractions of RCBC D1/D2 or DC#1/DC#2 evidence.
